mapper.select: SELECT wl.id, wl.member_id, wl.session_id, wl.date, wl.start_time, wl.end_time, wl.gym_id, wd.id AS detail_id, wd.workout_id, wd.title, wd.`set` AS set_col, wd.rep, wd.weight AS detail_weight FROM WORKOUT_LOG wl LEFT JOIN WORKOUT_DETAIL wd ON wl.id = wd.workout_id WHERE wl.member_id = #{clientId} ORDER BY wl.date DESC, wl.id DESC, wd.id ASC

SELECT wl.id AS id, DATE_FORMAT(wl.date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, TIME_FORMAT(wl.start_time, '%H:%i') AS startTime, TIME_FORMAT(wl.end_time, '%H:%i') AS endTime, COUNT(wd.id) AS exerciseCount FROM WORKOUT_LOG wl LEFT JOIN WORKOUT_DETAIL wd ON wd.workout_id = wl.id WHERE wl.member_id = #{clientId} GROUP BY wl.id, wl.date, wl.start_time, wl.end_time ORDER BY wl.date DESC, wl.id DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT wl.id, wl.member_id, wl.session_id, wl.date, wl.start_time, wl.end_time, wl.gym_id, wd.id AS detail_id, wd.workout_id, wd.title, wd.`set` AS set_col, wd.rep, wd.weight AS detail_weight FROM WORKOUT_LOG wl LEFT JOIN WORKOUT_DETAIL wd ON wl.id = wd.workout_id WHERE wl.id = #{logId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WORKOUT_DETAIL (workout_id, title, `set`, rep, weight) VALUES (#{workoutId}, #{title}, #{set}, #{rep}, #{weight})
